_comment: Agent Skills index for Future Intelligen. Each skill maps to a real, navigable URL on the public site. No fake backend endpoints. SHA-256 digests are placeholders — compute and pin them when content stabilizes.

skills.name: contact_company
skills.description: Open the contact page with email and a contact form.

skills.name: browse_services
skills.description: Browse the full catalog of technical, business, and real-estate services.

skills.name: browse_real_estate_services
skills.description: View digital solutions for real-estate offices, developers, and brokers.

skills.name: browse_technology_services
skills.description: View web development, CRM, dashboards, and API integration services.

skills.name: read_company_profile
skills.description: Read a concise Markdown summary of the company.
